$comment: Select the relevant KB(s) + a per-KB query for this spec-drafting task, grounded ONLY on the catalog summaries. output_schema forces the shape the route_score oracle reads and the generate's dynamic searches consume. On a gate FAILURE the flow loops back here; `feedback` carries the oracle's verdict (empty on the first pass) so the re-plan fixes exactly what was flagged.

selections.description: only the KB(s) relevant to the task; at most 3, most relevant first

kb.description: a KB name EXACTLY as in the catalog

query.description: a focused search query for that KB
